All Classes and Interfaces

Class
Description
AdvertiseBean
 
AdvertiseCtl
 
AdvertiseListCtl
 
AdvertiseModel
 
ApplicationException
ApplicationException is used to handle application-level exceptions.
ArtBean
 
ArtCtl
 
ArtListCtl
 
ArtModel
 
BaseBean
BaseBean is the superclass for all beans in the project.
BaseCtl
BaseCtl is the abstract parent controller for all controllers.
BroadcastBean
 
BroadcastCtl
 
BroadcastListCtl
 
BroadcastModel
 
ChangePasswordCtl
Controller for changing user passwords.
CollegeBean
CollegeBean represents the college entity.
CollegeCtl
CollegeCtl controller handle College data operation
CollegeListCtl
 
CollegeModel
Handles all database operations for College.
CourseBean
CourseBean represents a course entity in the system.
CourseCtl
 
CourseListCtl
 
CourseModel
Handles all database operations related to Course.
DatabaseException
DatabaseException is thrown when any database-related error occurs, such as connection failure, SQL issues, or transaction problems.
DataUtility
The DataUtility class provides utility methods for data type conversions, validations, and formatting operations commonly used throughout the application.
DataValidator
Utility class that provides various data validation methods used throughout the application such as checking null, numbers, email format, names, roll numbers, password strength, phone numbers and date validations.
DropdownListBean
DropdownListBean is a common interface implemented by all beans that are used in dropdown lists.
DuplicateRecordException
DuplicateRecordException is thrown when an attempt is made to add a record that already exists in the database.
EmailBuilder
Utility class used to build HTML-based email message bodies for different user actions like registration, password recovery, and password change notifications.
EmailMessage
EmailMessage holds the structure of an email.
EmailUtility
Utility class for sending emails using JavaMail API.
ErrorCtl
 
FacultyBean
FacultyBean represents the details of a faculty member.
FacultyCtl
FacultyCtl controller handle faculty data operation
FacultyListCtl
 
FacultyModel
FacultyModel manages all CRUD operations for the st_faculty table.
ForgetPasswordCtl
 
FrontController
Main Controller performs session checking and logging operations before calling any application controller.
GetMarksheetCtl
 
GymworkoutBean
 
GymworkoutCtl
 
GymworkoutListCtl
 
GymworkoutModel
 
HTMLUtility
Utility class for generating HTML dropdown elements.
InternetBean
 
InternetCtl
 
InternetListCtl
 
InternetModel
 
JDBCDataSource
JDBCDataSource manages database connections using the C3P0 connection pool.
LoginCtl
 
MarksheetBean
MarksheetBean stores marksheet details of a student.
MarksheetCtl
 
MarksheetListCtl
 
MarksheetMeritListCtl
 
MarksheetModel
MarksheetModel handles all operations related to the st_marksheet table.
MyProfileCtl
 
NotificationBean
 
NotificationCtl
 
NotificationListCtl
 
NotificationModel
 
ORSView
 
PaymentBean
 
PaymentCtl
 
PaymentListCtl
 
PaymentModel
 
PropertyReader
PropertyReader is a utility class used to fetch values from the system.properties file inside the resource bundle.
RecordNotFoundException
RecordNotFoundException is thrown when a requested record does not exist in the database.
RoleBean
RoleBean represents different user roles in the system.
RoleCtl
 
RoleListCtl
 
RoleModel
RoleModel handles all CRUD operations related to the st_role table.
ServletUtility
ServletUtility is a helper class that provides common utility methods for forwarding, redirecting, setting messages, and storing data in the request scope while working with Servlets and JSPs.
StudentBean
StudentBean represents a student entity in the application.
StudentCtl
 
StudentListCtl
 
StudentModel
StudentModel handles all database operations related to student records.
SubjectBean
SubjectBean represents a subject entity.
SubjectCtl
 
SubjectListCtl
 
SubjectModel
SubjectModel handles all database operations related to subjects.
TestCollegeModel
 
TestCourseModel
 
TestEmailUtility
 
TestFacultyModel
 
TestMarksheetModel
 
TestRoleModel
 
TestStudentModel
 
TestSubjectModel
 
TestTimetableModel
 
TestUserModel
 
TimetableBean
TimetableBean represents an exam timetable entry.
TimetableCtl
 
TimetableListCtl
 
TimetableModel
TimetableModel handles all database operations related to timetable entries.
UserBean
UserBean represents a user of the application.
UserCtl
 
UserListCtl
 
UserModel
UserModel handles all database operations related to User entities.
UserRegistrationCtl
 
WelcomeCtl
